title: Administration of oaths or affirmations
doc_html:
Rule 2.3.  Administration of oaths or affirmations

           The Secretary shall administer all oaths or affirmations, except that the President shall administer the oath to the Secretary.
doc_text:
Rule 2.3.  Administration of oaths or affirmations
The Secretary shall administer all oaths or affirmations, except that the President
shall administer the oath to the Secretary.
